steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which country the musk thistle grows alongside the Peruvian lily in, according to the table. The task is purely to locate the correct row in the data — there is no inference required.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the United States.': The United States appears in the table, but its row pairs a different neighboring species with a different target species, not musk thistle with Peruvian lily. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Japan.': Japan also appears in the table but is paired with different plants, not musk thistle alongside Peruvian lily. ✗
  • Choice C — 'the United Kingdom.': The United Kingdom is likewise in the table but paired with a different plant combination. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Argentina.': The table directly shows musk thistle as the neighboring species and Peruvian lily as the target species in Argentina. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
